About Valenis

Delivering Depth, Discretion and Cross-border Fluency in Global Advisory

We bring together deep knowledge, industry insight and broad experience to help clients find clarity in complex environments across diverse geographies and industry sectors. By fostering collaboration across teams, Valenis Partners' complementary advisory services operate with one goal: to preserve and advance the strength of private enterprise with clarity and discretion.

We do not manage capital — we advise those who do. Our independence is our defining characteristic. Without the conflicts inherent in firms that both advise and invest, we are free to offer counsel that is honest, complete and entirely aligned with our clients' interests.

3 — Complementary Integrated Global Advisory Services

We provide strategic and tactical guidance to sell-side events — joint ventures, spin-offs and divestitures — across Africa, the UAE and Europe.

We assist corporates, financial sponsors and their portfolio companies on a retained basis to execute acquisition-led growth strategies and associated fundraising.

What We Do

Integrated Advisory Services

Our experienced advisory teams provide strategic, restructuring and private capital services to corporations, financial sponsors and institutions across Africa, the UAE and Europe.

Strategic Advisory

Our Strategic Advisory team partners with leaders and boards to navigate transformational decisions with clarity, discretion and conviction.

Restructurings

We implement world-class restructuring and distressed M&A services, comprising balance sheet recapitalisation across the EMEA region.

Private Capital Markets

Customised advice on asset, fund and portfolio liquidity considerations across a wide array of GP- and LP-led transactions.

Africa · UAE · Europe

Cross-border fluency across our three core geographies — deep local knowledge combined with global institutional access.

Our Approach

How We Work

We provide strategic and tactical guidance across the full lifecycle of a transaction — from origination through to completion — across Africa, the UAE and Europe.

Buy-Side Advisory

We assist corporates, financial sponsors and their portfolio companies on a retained basis to execute acquisition-led growth strategies, as well as advice on any associated fundraising across Africa, the UAE and Europe.

Sell-Side Advisory

We provide strategic and tactical guidance to sell-side events. Our advisory businesses comprise joint ventures, spin-offs and divestitures across our core geographies of Africa, the UAE and Europe.

Capital Raises

Covering debt, equity, mezzanine, strategic and trade finance structures, we assist clients in raising the right capital from the right counterparties at the right time.

Relationship Intelligence

Our institutional investor network spans 50+ pre-qualified investors across Africa, the UAE and Europe. We leverage deep relationships and proprietary intelligence to connect clients with aligned capital partners.

Our Principles

The Values That Define Our Work

Independence

We carry no proprietary book, manage no fund and hold no equity positions. Our advice is free of the conflicts that compromise larger institutions. Our only mandate is to serve the client.

Discretion

We operate quietly. Our clients value privacy and expect that sensitive mandates are handled with the utmost confidentiality. Discretion is not a feature of our service — it is the foundation of it.

Precision

Every mandate receives the full weight of our intellectual rigour. We do not outsource analysis, delegate relationships or work on volume. We take fewer mandates so we can work on each with complete focus.

Long-term Perspective

We measure success by the quality of outcomes over years, not the number of transactions in a quarter. We build partnerships, not transaction lists. Integrity before ambition — always.

"We preserve and advance the strength of private enterprise with clarity and discretion."
